Minors' Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Sep-15-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minors' Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: June Leathley.
Alan Hamilton, Esq. for Petitioner: Miah M. Zephier, present as Guardian at litem for: Nino Zephier and Gabriel Zephier, minor Claimants, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise for each minor is approved.
No Fees or Costs.
A net balance of $25,000.00 for each minor to be deposited into a blocked account with Wells Fargo Bank, 1532 West El Camino Ave., Sacramento, CA., no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Orders Approving Compromise of Claim and Orders
to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.
